assertions.assertion: Calls AddJwtBearer with Authority set to 'https://identity.example.com'
Sets TokenValidationParameters.ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' to prevent JWT confusion attacks
assertions.rationale: Code shows options.TokenValidationParameters.ValidTypes = ["at+jwt"] with explanation about JWT confusion attacks

assertions.assertion: Includes UseAuthentication() before UseAuthorization() in the middleware pipeline
assertions.rationale: Code shows app.UseAuthentication() before app.UseAuthorization() with explanation of correct ordering
Includes dotnet add package command and csproj PackageReference for Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer
